ul.li: Table IDs are 64-bit bitmasks to allow $O(1)$ set intersection checks.
Pruning occurs at each K-level to prevent exponential state explosion.
"Interesting Orders" are preserved if the cost delta is within $\epsilon$.
Calculate cost for all physical access paths (SeqScan, IndexScan).
Store the minimum cost plan for each relation in the DP Table.
For each pair ${R_i, R_j}$, find optimal join method.
Prune non-optimal plans (e.g., if HashJoin is cheaper than NLJ).
Combine optimal $K=2$ plans with remaining $K=1$ tables.
